title: Enforce Organization-Scoped Authorization on All Requests
description:
Every request must be authorized against the tenant/organization to ensure data never crosses tenant boundaries. The session must contain `organization_id` and all data access must be scoped accordingly.

## Requirements

- Session contains `organization_id` (and user/member ID)
- All app data access is scoped by `organization_id` (and other authz rules)
- Attempting cross-tenant access is denied and logged as a security event
acceptance_criteria: Session includes organization_id and user/member ID
All database queries and data access are scoped by organization_id
Cross-tenant access attempts are denied with appropriate error response
Cross-tenant access attempts are logged as security incidents
middleware_changes: Authorization middleware extracts and validates organization_id from session on every request. All data access paths enforce organization-scoped queries.
implementation_notes: This extends the existing Laravel UsedByTeam trait pattern to the new Stytch-based auth system. The organization_id from Stytch sessions replaces the current team_id-based scoping.
